## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Testing

- [ ] I described how this was tested.
- [ ] I ran the relevant local build/test steps for this change.

## Docs

- [ ] I updated docs if the build flow, repo structure, or content conventions changed.
- [ ] No doc updates were needed.

## Visual Changes

- [ ] I attached screenshots or added a short visual note for renderer/editor-visible changes.
- [ ] No visual changes were made.

## Hygiene

- [ ] I did not include unrelated changes or local build/dev artifacts.
